prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Starter: Caprese Salad with Heirloom Tomatoes
Main Course: Braised Beef Short Ribs with Creamy Parmesan Polenta and Garlic-Sautéed Broccolini
Dessert: Lemon Olive Oil Cake with Mixed Berry Compote and Vanilla Bean Ice Cream
